case_title: LARA WITHOP VS. ABDELKRIN MOUHAMMOU et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER SHORTENING TIME RE: MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE.

DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S RESPONSES TO SUPPLEMENTAL INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE, AND SUPPLEMENTAL REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE, IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $300, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL AND FOR ADDITIONAL TIME TO COMPLETE MEDIATION

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-06-2004 IN DEPT. 206, DEFENDANT ABDELKRIN MOUHAMMOU'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND/OR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS GRANTED.THE TRIAL DATE IS CONTINUED FROM 11/8/04 TO 3/7/05 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. THIS SHALL BE A FIRM DATE FOR TRIAL. THE CURRENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE VACATED AND A NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE SET AND MAILED BY THE COURT. WRITTEN ORDER PENDING. JUDGE ROBERT DONDERO, CLERKS DIANNE BOFFI, RANI EDWARDS, REPORTER JOANN BRYCE.
